name: Strawberry Pavlova Roll (Pavrolla)
recipeIngredient: 300 ml whipping cream, 1 1/4 cups (measured before whipping)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk egg whites and salt until they form soft peaks. To achieve the best results, use eggs at room temperature.
2. Gradually add sugar in 3 or 4 parts while continuing to beat until peaks stay upright.
3. Beat in vanilla extract.
4. Line a sponge roll tin with non-stick baking paper or teflon sheet. (Sue's note: Grease the lining as well to prevent sticking.)
5. Bake at 190°C, 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes, until the surface is golden brown and the center feels firm.
6. Meanwhile, grease another sheet of greaseproof paper with soft butter and sprinkle with caster sugar.
7. Remove from oven and turn "cake" out upside down onto the prepared paper.
8. Remove paper either now or when cold, whichever works best for you.
9. When it is cold, spread 2/3 of the whipped cream and sliced strawberries evenly over the roll.
10. Roll up using the paper to assist; make a short fat roll or a long thin one.
11. Place the roll with the seam at the bottom on a serving plate.
12. Decorate with the remaining whipped cream and whole strawberries in a line along the top.
13. Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.
